problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Combining Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
